name: ai_marketing_claude_prompts
description: Reusable prompt pack derived from the ai_marketing_claude capability.

prompts.name: website_audit
prompts.template: Perform a detailed marketing audit on the website at {website_url}.
prompts.use_case: Marketing teams auditing client websites to create tailored marketing strategies.

prompts.name: copy_generation
prompts.template: Generate marketing copy for a product targeting {target_audience} based on this brief: {marketing_brief}.
prompts.use_case: Agencies generating complete multi-channel marketing campaigns quickly.

prompts.name: email_sequence
prompts.template: Create an email marketing sequence with {sequence_length} emails, tone set to {tone}, targeting {target_audience}.
prompts.use_case: Content strategists building marketing calendars aligned with business goals.

prompts.name: ad_campaign
prompts.template: Design an ad campaign targeting {target_audience} with a budget of {budget} for platforms {platforms}.
prompts.use_case: Competitive analysts researching market positioning and intelligence.

prompts.name: content_calendar
prompts.template: Generate a content calendar for the next {time_period} with {frequency} scheduled posts.
prompts.use_case: Sales teams preparing professional marketing collateral for client presentations.

prompts.name: competitive_analysis
prompts.template: Analyze the competitors: {competitor_info} and produce competitive intelligence.

prompts.name: client_report
prompts.template: Compile all generated marketing assets and insights into a client-ready PDF report.
